name: Chameleon
description: Adaptive chromatophore intelligence — nanocrystal lattices in skin cells actively tune wavelength reflection through structural color, not pigment. Each eye moves independently with 360° visual field, processing two separate visual streams simultaneously. Ballistic tongue acceleration reaches 41g in 20 milliseconds. Split-brain visual processing enables parallel threat assessment and prey tracking — two worlds perceived at once.

core_attributes.neurology: independent bilateral visual processing, rapid motor cortex
core_attributes.pattern: structural nanocrystal color, independent eye tracking, ballistic predation, parallel perception
